title: 18inch Large Size Metallic Gold Balloons, 5 pcs Shiny Gold Latex Balloons for Birthday Wedding Party Decoration
features: 🎈【Black Balloon】:You will receive 5 pieces 18 inch large and shiny gold balloons.
🎈【High Quality】:The balloons are made of great latex,if you filled with air,they will last for a long time.
🎈【Easy to Inflate】:The large balloons can be filled with both air and helium,the size is 18 inch after inflating.
🎈【Wide Application】:The large size shiny chrome balloons will crate strong and warm atmosphere easier,you can use the large balloons to crate a balloon arch being used at the base.
🎈【Customer Service】:If you have any questions,please feel free to contact us,we will solve it for you in 12 hours.
description: Otmvicor 18 inch large metallic gold balloons, pack of 5 shiny golden latex balloons for decorating birthday, wedding and party parties
